metadata.name: Unblock Card After False Fraud Alert

description: A customer's card was blocked due to a suspected fraudulent transaction which the customer confirms was legitimate.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer and identify the transaction that triggered the fraud alert.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the customer and identifies the $500 online purchase.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the customer that the transaction was legitimate.

expected_outcome.value: The customer confirms they made the purchase. Agent marks the alert as a false positive.

nodes.task_description: Remove the block from the customer's card.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully unblocks the card, making it available for immediate use.
